findings.issue: project.md is missing from Context Files. The Project knowledge block lists overview.md, architecture.md, and patterns.md, but project.md is a mandatory context file required for all tasks.
findings.fix: Add '- [project.md](.claude/skills/project-knowledge/project.md)' to the Project knowledge block in Context Files.

findings.issue: TDD Anchor is present for a code-writing task but contains only a prose justification note ('No unit tests — TUI callbacks require a real terminal'), not entries in the required format '`tests/path::test_name` — description'. The round-1 fix replaced the empty stub with a prose note, which is an improvement, but the format still does not conform to the template for a code task.
findings.fix: Either delete the TDD Anchor section entirely (the correct signal when no unit tests can be written) and move the 'make build && make lint' verification note into the Verification Steps section, or keep the section and document it clearly as a format exception with an HTML comment. Absence of the section is unambiguous; prose-in-TDD-Anchor is ambiguous.

findings.issue: Details section uses ### Files, ### Dependencies, ### Edge Cases subsections but lacks a ### Implementation hints subsection. Implementation hints are embedded inside the ### Files entries rather than in a dedicated subsection.
findings.fix: Add a '### Implementation hints' subsection with the key hints currently inside ### Files (e.g., do not call viewSwitchHandler from switchViewToProcPidStat; import cycle note; uppercase S rune mapping pattern).

findings.issue: project.md is missing from Context Files. The Project knowledge block lists overview.md, architecture.md, and deployment.md, but project.md is a mandatory context file required for all tasks.
findings.fix: Add '- [project.md](.claude/skills/project-knowledge/project.md)' to the Project knowledge block in Context Files.

findings.issue: Details section lacks explicit **Files** and **Implementation hints** labeled subsections. The section opens with 'No code changes in this task.' and uses unlabeled bold-text prose blocks for dependencies, test infrastructure, edge cases, and practical guidance. The structured subsection labels required by the template are absent.
findings.fix: Add '**Files:** N/A — no code changes in this task.' and '**Implementation hints:**' as labeled subsections to satisfy the template structure. The existing detailed prose blocks can remain as-is under their current headings.

notes.decisions_md: The file docs/features/001-feat-per-process-system-stats/001-feat-per-process-system-stats-decisions.md does not exist on disk. Both task files now carry the link in Context Files (round-1 fix applied). The link presence satisfies the template requirement for context file listing. The file must be created before task execution begins.
notes.task06_tdd_anchor: Round-1 fix replaced an empty TDD Anchor stub with a prose justification note. The note accurately describes the constraint (TUI callbacks cannot be unit-tested) but still does not contain properly-formatted test entries. Downgraded from major to minor because the rationale is accurate and the constraint is real.
notes.task06_atomicity: Task 06 modifies 4 files, which exceeds the 3-file atomicity guideline. The changes are logically cohesive (all wire one TUI screen into the interaction layer) and match the tech-spec task boundary exactly. No split finding raised — the cohesion check passes.
notes.carry_forward: All tech-spec Acceptance Criteria are carried forward into task 06 (task-scoped subset) and task 07 (full set). No AC items lost. Tech-spec has no TDD Anchor entries for task 6 (verify is make build && make lint only); nothing to carry forward there.
notes.dependency_graph: Task 06 wave 3 depends on Task 04 wave 2 (valid, 3 > 2). Task 07 wave 4 depends on Tasks 05 and 06 both at wave 3 (valid, 4 > 3). No cycles detected.
notes.skills_reviewers_consistency: Task 06: code-writing maps to [dev-code-reviewer, dev-security-auditor, dev-test-reviewer] — matches catalog and Reviewers section. Task 07: pre-deploy-qa maps to [] — matches catalog and Reviewers section ('No reviewers for this task.').
notes.round1_fixes_verified: decisions.md link added to task 06 Context Files: confirmed present. overview.md added to task 06 Context Files: confirmed present. TDD Anchor stub replaced with prose note in task 06: confirmed. Task 07 decisions.md and overview.md: confirmed present from round 1.
